description_long: This is a modern, open-frame shelving unit with a minimalist design, featuring a sturdy metal structure and five horizontal shelves made of dark wood or wood-like material. The frame is rectangular and extends above and below the shelving surfaces, providing both support and a distinctive geometric aesthetic. The middle section includes a set of three closed compartments or drawers with a lighter color, likely for concealed storage, contrasting with the open shelves above and below. The shelves are evenly spaced, offering ample storage or display space for books, decor, or other items. The overall construction appears robust, suitable for urban environments such as lofts, offices, or public spaces. The design is both functional and visually striking, blending industrial and contemporary styles.
description: A modern, open-frame shelving unit with five dark wood shelves and three central light-colored drawers, supported by a sturdy metal frame. Its minimalist, geometric design is ideal for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five shelves and three central drawers, highlighting the open structure and storage compartments.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the shelves and the depth of the frame, with the drawers barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shelves and the frame, with no visible drawers or handles.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the frame's depth and the alignment of the shelves.
